query: Clarify the 'Bruno API test support in verify recipe' feature. Read its discovery.md, surface all open questions, and produce a clarify.md with at least 2 DECISION entries.
expected_skill_contribution: The clarify recipe should emit First Visible Output, check discovery.md precondition, scan for ambiguities, produce a clarify.md with [FEAT]-CLR-NN entries in QUESTION/DECISION/RATIONALE/SPEC-IMPACT format, store a memory pointer, and report spec-ready AC hints.
fixture_intent: Validates the basic clarify workflow: precondition gate, ambiguity extraction, structured clarify.md output, and memory pointer storage.
baseline_gaps: jumps to writing spec.md without producing a clarify.md first
produces prose summaries instead of structured QUESTION/DECISION/RATIONALE/SPEC-IMPACT entries
skips the precondition gate and does not check for discovery.md existence
expected_behavior: emits First Visible Output block (scope + discovery source + open items count) before any tool call
produces a clarify.md with at least 2 entries using [FEAT]-CLR-NN IDs
every DECISION field contains a concrete testable value (no 'TBD' or 'depends')
stores a memory pointer with key `clarify-[feature]-pointer`

query: Clarify the 'parallel eval runner' feature which has a discovery.md with 6 unresolved 9-dimension items and 2 explicit TBD markers. Resolve all items or mark Blocked with specific blockers.
expected_skill_contribution: The clarify recipe must handle a feature with many unresolved implicit dimensions: scan all 9 dimensions, attempt resolution from context, ask targeted user questions for the unresolvable ones, and mark genuine blockers rather than guessing.
fixture_intent: A feature with multiple ambiguous implicit-requirement dimensions; the recipe must distinguish resolvable items (from existing docs) from items requiring user input, and escalate the latter with precise questions.
baseline_gaps: marks all 9 dimensions as N/A without attempting resolution from existing context
invents decisions without basis ('assume standard 5-second timeout') without flagging as assumption
does not separate resolved items from blocked items in the clarify.md output
expected_behavior: scans all 9 implicit-requirement dimensions from discovery.md or applies the sweep independently
resolves at least 4 dimensions from existing project context (AGENTS.md, ADR, existing code)
formulates at most 1 precise question per unresolvable item before marking Blocked
produces a clarify.md with clearly separated Resolved Clarifications and Unresolved Items sections

query: Run clarify on a feature where discovery.md does NOT exist. Verify the recipe halts correctly with a clear blocker message, then clarify the 'verify recipe split' feature which has an existing discovery.md with conflicting user stories and scope boundary ambiguities.
expected_skill_contribution: The clarify recipe must: (1) correctly halt with a blocker message when discovery.md is absent (CLARIFY-03 gate), then (2) successfully process a complex feature with contradicting user stories — identifying contradictions as ambiguities and resolving them explicitly in clarify.md.
fixture_intent: Tests both the precondition gate (negative path) and complex clarification with conflicting requirements. The recipe must not silently skip the gate check and must surface contradictions as first-class clarification items, not ignore them.
baseline_gaps: proceeds to write clarify.md even when discovery.md is absent (gate failure)
ignores contradictions between user stories — only extracts TBD markers
produces a clarify.md with vague DECISION fields like 'will be determined during implementation'
expected_behavior: halts with clear error message when discovery.md is absent, naming the expected path and the command to fix it
identifies story contradictions as explicit CLR entries (not just TBD markers)
resolves contradictions by producing a DECISION with a tie-breaking rule or explicit priority ordering
produces a SPEC IMPACT field for each resolved contradiction that is directly usable as a WHEN/THEN/SHALL clause
